message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[\"10\", 0.0, \"inf\", -5, 8]","[\"0.12\", \"nan\", 0.05, 0.1, null]","[1.2, -0.1, \"0.5\", \"abc\", 0]","1000.0","\"bad\"","6"],"focus":"mixed-type sanitation: nonnumeric strings, zero/negative/inf prices, null returns, risk_penalty coerced to 0 and per-index error ordering"},{"input_lines":["[10.0, 20.0, 5.0]","[0.1, 0.2, 0.05]","[0, -0.1, 0]","500.0","0.01","15"],"focus":"all max_weights clipped to 0 (trigger 'all caps zero') with invalid round_decimals coerced to 6; check clipping messages and no global early exit"},{"input_lines":["[10.0, 5.0]","[0.2, 0.1]","[0.505, 0.495]","100.0","0.0","2"],"focus":"rounding overshoot: rounded weights sum >1.0 causing spent>budget and requiring corrective downward adjustment of the last allocated asset"}]}
